rules.title: Styles
rules.description: Changes that do not affect the meaning of the code (white-space, formatting, missing semi-colons, etc)

rules.title: Code Refactoring
rules.description: A code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature

rules.title: Performance Improvements
rules.description: A code change that improves performance

rules.title: Tests
rules.description: Adding missing tests or correcting existing tests

rules.title: Builds
rules.description: Changes that affect the build system or external dependencies (example scopes: gulp, broccoli, npm)

rules.title: Continuous Integrations
rules.description: Changes to our CI configuration files and scripts (example scopes: Travis, Circle, BrowserStack, SauceLabs)

rules.title: Chores
rules.description: Other changes that don't modify src or test files

rules.title: Breaking Changes
rules.description: Including a commit in the footnote with BREAKING CHANGE: or <type>(scope)! means a breaking API change was introduced. Breaking changes can be part of any type of commit. (MAJOR)

rules.title: Generate Scopes File
rules.description: Generate a scopes template file using the configured file template path
